name: getSessionEvents
description: Get calendar events for a specific session, including exact dates, times, resources, and availability. Use only when the facility schedule feed is not enough. Requires programId and sessionId from a previous searchPrograms or getFacilitySchedule response. Call when the caller asks what time is the class or what day for a specific session; if there are still spots available or about waitlist status; or needs the actual event-level calendar.

function.name: getSessionEvents
function.description: Get calendar events for a session. Use only when you already have programId and sessionId from a prior tool result.

programId.description: Program ID from a prior searchPrograms or getFacilitySchedule response. Do not guess.

sessionId.description: Session ID from a prior searchPrograms or getFacilitySchedule response. Do not guess.

startDate.description: ISO date for the start of the requested event window.

endDate.description: ISO date for the end of the requested event window.

messages.content: Let me get those details for you.
